events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Conclusion: tile installed over a single-layer wood subfloor (missing the second underlayment/backer layer TCNA prescribes) fails to meet the L/360 deflection limit, producing the classic pattern of joist-line tile/grout cracking and hollow-sounding debonded tile — a non-compliant substrate defect requiring tear-out and proper underlayment/membrane before the floor returns to service.
